assets.name: MV Building A
assets.device: A1 MV building: RMU, service transformer, 400V AC distribution board DB001
assets.feed_note: A1 AC DB, fed from B3 MV intake. Built-in 4-pole ATS to IEC 61439-2.

assets.name: MV Building B
assets.device: B1 MV building: RMU, service transformer, 400V AC distribution board DB001
assets.feed_note: A2 AC DB, fed from B3 MV intake. Built-in 4-pole ATS to IEC 61439-2.
